description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.title: Home Discovery Platform: Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager discovery
items.name: Home Discovery Platform: Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Home Discovery Platform is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger homepage and unified b2c web shell create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across B2C Web Application, iOS Application.

linkedInitiatives.description: Home Discovery Platform initiative focused on improving homepage, unified b2c web shell, strengthening customer value for Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager, and evolving delivery across B2C Web Application, iOS Application.

assignments.teamName: Home Discovery Growth - B2C Web Shell
assignments.how: Leads the discovery framing, customer learning plan, and recommendation for how Home Discovery Platform should prove value for Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager.
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on homepage and unified b2c web shell.

assignments.teamName: Home Discovery Growth - Saved Search Alerts
assignments.how: Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on homepage and unified b2c web shell.

assignments.teamName: Market Intelligence & Pricing - Property Valuation Tool
assignments.how: Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on homepage and unified b2c web shell.
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on homepage and unified b2c web shell.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager will choose Home Discovery Platform because homepage and unified b2c web shell solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager describes homepage as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Home Discovery Platform experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Home Discovery Platform if homepage and unified b2c web shell improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Home Discovery Platform case.
Which KPI movement would make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager can understand and complete the core Home Discovery Platform workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering homepage and unified b2c web shell.
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Home Discovery Platform within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind homepage and unified b2c web shell.
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering homepage and unified b2c web shell.
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across B2C Web Application, iOS Application.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Home Discovery Platform opportunity.
